expectations.text: Counts distinct electrode_group_name values per session — does not count raw Electrode rows as tetrodes (each tetrode has 4 electrodes)
expectations.evidence: Uses `count(distinct electrode_group_name)` with note 'Counting raw Electrode rows would over-count by a factor of 4'.

expectations.text: Names .aggr() OR an equivalent (Session.proj * Electrode.proj | unique-on-electrode-group) approach; does not require .aggr() as the only valid answer.
expectations.evidence: Uses `.aggr()` as canonical and provides pandas-equivalent drop_duplicates+groupby form.
